mission.title: dify: Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function
mission.description: Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current dify setup
steps.description:
Verify your dify version and configuration:
```bash
docker compose version
```
This feature requires a working dify installation.

steps.title: Review dify configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant dify configuration:
### 1. Is this request related to a challenge you're experiencing? Tell me about your story.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function
steps.description:
Hi maintainers, I would like to help with this feature.

I reproduced the shared-memory behavior with a minimal Chatflow containing two memory-enabled LLM nodes:

- Node A: responsible only for remembering the user's favorite color
- Node B: responsible only for remembering the user's favorite number

Turn 1:

```text
My favorite color is blue, and my favorite number is 42.
```

Turn 2:
```text
What do you remember from last time? Also, if your memory contains information outside your

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.
